pi_items.source: WebSearch confirmation and cross-reference with task.json description; books.toscrape.com is a real, public e-commerce sandbox website designed for web scraping practice
Domain extracted from target_url; verified via WebSearch and setup_task.sh configuration
Verified in setup_task.sh line 18: REPORTS_DIR="/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports" and line 35: rm -f "$REPORTS_DIR"/thin_content_report.txt

Verified as real Screaming Frog column via WebSearch documentation; confirmed in export_result.sh line 38 with case-insensitive grep check: grep -qi "Word Count"; verified in verifier.py line 81 as requirement for valid CSV data
Verified in verifier.py line 60: if rows >= 20: score += 10, confirming minimum of 20 rows for export validation
Verified in verifier.py line 102: if report_size >= 400: score += 10, confirming minimum of 400 bytes for report file size

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real public website used for web scraping education. Data is non-synthetic and generated by live crawling of this site using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. The task requires exporting CSV data containing the Word Count column from the Internal HTML tab, with minimum constraints of 20 rows and 400 character report size. Export directory is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports and report path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/thin_content_report.txt. All metadata values match implementation code in setup scripts and verifier.
